sources.evidence: The EH Holden Car Club of Victoria model history records the 26 August 1963 release, Red motor introduction, S4 details and 256,959-unit production total.
Unique Cars and Parts provides model-specific 149 and 179 engine, transmission, suspension, brake and dimension specifications for the EH Holden.
The official club guide covers research, seller questions, test driving, rust inspection, mechanical checks, professional inspection and paperwork.
Verified Shannons Insurance channel episode dedicated to the EJ and EH Holden; 14:48 duration and approximately 20,000 views at verification.
Selected as the strongest concise authoritative overview: a dedicated Shannons Club TV episode from the verified Shannons Insurance channel, covering styling and performance context.
Official EH Holden Car Club of Victoria site, open to EJ/EH owners and enthusiasts and providing club, technical and model information.
Warburton Early Holden Spares identifies itself as a specialist in FE–HG Holden parts, explicitly including EH, with worldwide shipping.
Carsales model-filtered Holden EH inventory page; individual stock changes while the verified model route remains stable.
Street Machine’s editorial history places the EJ and EH within Holden design, engineering and Australian cultural context.
